en.name: Sudoku X
en.desc: Sudoku with a twist! In addition to rows, columns, and boxes, both main diagonals must also contain digits 1-9 exactly once. Extra challenge for Sudoku masters!
en.howToPlay: Click a cell and enter 1-9. Each row, column, 3x3 box, and both diagonals must contain all digits 1-9 exactly once. Blue cells highlight diagonal constraints.
tips: Diagonal cells have fewer possible values

zh.name: X数独
zh.desc: 数独新玩法！除了行、列和宫，两条主对角线也必须恰好包含1-9数字。数独大师的额外挑战！
zh.howToPlay: 填入1-9的数字。每行每列每宫必须恰好包含1-9一次。两条主对角线也必须包含1-9的所有数字。
tips: 对角线提供额外的约束
先关注对角线交叉的格子
使用标准数独技巧加对角线约束
对角线有助于消除候选数
